title: jhonbine_'s mod "sorta siren head mod thingy"
description: Some crappy siren head mod, still alpha 0.0.1 rn....
body:
so uhh, ye, this my siren head mod, its kinda got some stuff, i cant quite say whats gonna be in it cus a updates coming, and that adds some more stuff than this, but rn i got a shotgun a revolver siren head and light head, the guys's ai are horable along side there animations, the updates gonna make it good, so ye. 

oh also heres a image of siren head
